phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la fermata del vaporetto per Burano, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH la fer-MA-ta del va-po-RET-to per Boo-RAH-no, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the waterfront, near the church.

responses.english: At the waterfront, near the church.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre il museo del merletto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-ra AH-preh il moo-ZEH-o del mer-LET-to, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto per il museo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-to COS-ta il bee-LYET-to per il moo-ZEH-o, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, è permesso fare fotografie nelle strade, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, eh per-MES-so FAH-reh fo-to-GRAH-fee-eh nel-leh STRA-deh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trovano i bagni pubblici, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TRO-va-no ee BAHN-yee POOB-blee-chee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Near the bridge, on the left.

responses.english: Near the bridge, on the left.
